summary: 8 film announcements, 9 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: The Silent Patient
film.announcement: Sony, Annapurna and Plan B are teaming on a feature adaptation of Alex Michaelides' bestselling novel.

film.title: Supermax
film.announcement: AnnaSophia Robb joins Will Smith in the action thriller, co-starring opposite the actor.

film.title: Goblin
film.talent: Kenneth Branagh, Skyler Gisondo, Will Forte
film.announcement: Will Forte joins Kenneth Branagh and Skyler Gisondo in A24's 'Goblin'.

film.title: Turn The Lights Back On
film.announcement: June Squibb joins Alex Borstein in the indie dramedy.

film.title: Deadpool
film.announcement: Ryan Reynolds confirms a new Deadpool movie is in works.

film.title: Runaway
film.talent: Josh Duhamel, James Franco, Paula Patton, Summer H. Howell
film.announcement: Josh Duhamel, James Franco, Paula Patton and Summer H. Howell wrap production on the action-thriller.

film.title: Kill Jackie
film.announcement: Catherine Zeta-Jones thriller 'Kill Jackie' is acquired by AMC+.

film.title: Champions of Nowhere
film.announcement: Filmmakers behind 'The Brutalist' and 'Nawi' strike a three-film co-production deal with a Kenya soccer documentary 'Champions of Nowhere' announced.

tv.title: Dutton Ranch
tv.announcement: Ed Harris is returning to 'Dutton Ranch' for Season 2 following a showrunner change despite character arc frustrations.

tv.title: Monsterverse Series
tv.talent: Wyatt Russell, Corey Stoll, Ralph Ineson, Nyasha Hatendi
tv.announcement: Corey Stoll, Ralph Ineson and Nyasha Hatendi join the Wyatt Russell-led Monsterverse series.

tv.title: Sex Criminals
tv.announcement: Joseph Lee and Sunita Mani join Prime Video's 'Sex Criminals' series based on the comic.

tv.title: The Magnificent Seven
tv.announcement: MGM+ adds four actors to the 'The Magnificent Seven' series regular cast.

tv.title: RoboCop
tv.announcement: Amazon orders 'RoboCop' series from Blumhouse and Atomic Monster, tackling themes of corporate greed.

tv.title: The Real Housewives of New York City
tv.announcement: Season 16 cast photos, trailer and premiere date are set; Carole Radziwill returns full-time to the cast.

tv.title: The Daily Show
tv.announcement: The Daily Show launches its first microdrama spoofing billionaires Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos as Bachelor contestants.

tv.title: Dancing With the Stars: The Next Pro
tv.announcement: Cast revealed for 'Dancing With the Stars: The Next Pro', the competition to find a new pro for Season 35.
